zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Guy Brienne於1319年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾瓦爾恩斯 卡素時，他的父親Sir Guy Bryan31歲，母親Lady Joan Carew de Brienne24歲。他於1344年之前與Anne Holwey結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1370年被列為admiral of the west。他去世於1390年8月17日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Guy Brienne于1319年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾瓦爾恩斯 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Guy Bryan31岁，母亲Lady Joan Carew de Brienne24岁。他于1344年之前与Anne Holwey结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1370年被列为admiral of the west。他去世于1390年8月17日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Guy Brienne was born in 1319, in Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Guy Bryan, was 31 and his mother, Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, was 24. He married Anne Holwey before 1344. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1370, his occupation is listed as admiral of the west. He died on 17 August 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Guy Brienne est né en 1319, à Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Guy Bryan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anne Holwey avant 1344. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1370, sa profession de son indiquée est admiral of the west. Il est décédé le 17 août 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Guy Brienne 1319 in Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Guy Bryan 31 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Carew de Brienne 24. Er hat vor 1344 Anne Holwey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1370 ist sein Beruf als admiral of the west aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. August 1390 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy Brienne è nato il nel 1319 nel Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Guy Bryan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anne Holwey prima del 1344. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1370, la sua occupazione è indicata come admiral of the west. Morì il 17 agosto 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Guy Brienneが1319年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアワルウイン'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Guy Bryanは31歳，母Lady Joan Carew de Brienneは24歳であった。1344年以前にAnne Holweyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1370年，職業はadmiral of the westと記録されている。彼は1390年8月17日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Guy Brienne(이)가 1319년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 월w이'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Guy Bryan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Carew de Brienne(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1344년 이전 Anne Holwey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1370년, 그의 직업은 admiral of the west이었다. 그는 1390년 8월 17일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy Brienne nasceu em 1319, em Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Guy Bryan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Holwey antes 1344. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1370, sua profissão aparece como admiral of the west. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Guy Brienne родился в 1319 г. в местности валвин'с кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Guy Bryan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Holwey перед 1344 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1370 году он работал по профессии admiral of the west. Он умер 17 августа 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Guy Brienne nació en 1319, en Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Guy Bryan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Carew de Brienne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anne Holwey antes de 1344. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1370, su ocupación registrada era admiral of the west. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
